strengths: 15+ years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud systems
Strong expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators)
Proven entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) and open-source contributions in AI-relevant domains
concerns: No formal advanced degree (MS/PhD) in AI or related field
Limited explicit mention of cloud or AI platform strategy experience at scale
Most recent role (re:cinq) is brief (since April 2025) with unclear AI product ownership
response.justification: Aisha demonstrates strong engineering depth and innovation across multiple domains, including AI-agent tooling, but lacks clear evidence of cloud/AI platform strategy at scale or advanced AI-specific education. The entrepreneurial and open-source experience partially compensates for the degree gap, but the brief tenure in the most relevant recent role raises questions about sustained impact.
